nasb.text: For on the first of the first month he began to go up from Babylon; and on the first of the fifth month he came to Jerusalem, because the good hand of his God was upon him.

esv.text: For on the first day of the first month he began to go up from Babylonia, and on the first day of the fifth month he came to Jerusalem, for the good hand of his God was on him.

cnv.text: 正月初一，以斯拉開始從巴比倫上來；五月初一來到耶路撒冷，他　神施恩的手幫助他，
